---
title: Projects
listing:
  - id: projects-2026
    contents: /*/index.qmd
    include:
      year: 2026
    image-align: left
    image-height: 200px
    fields: [title, subtitle, image]

  - id: projects-2025
    contents: /*/index.qmd
    include:
      year: 2025
    image-align: left
    image-height: 200px
    fields: [title, subtitle, image]

  - id: projects-2024
    contents: /*/index.qmd
    include:
      year: 2024
    image-align: left
    image-height: 200px
    fields: [title, subtitle, image]

  - id: projects-2023
    contents: /*/index.qmd
    include:
      year: 2023
    image-align: left
    image-height: 200px
    fields: [title, subtitle, image]

  - id: projects-2022
    contents: /*/index.qmd
    include:
      year: 2022
    image-align: left
    image-height: 200px
    fields: [title, subtitle, image]
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

Projects are grouped by year for readability. For projects that spanned multiple years, I've placed them in the year when most of the work took place.

## 2026

::: {#projects-2026}
:::

## 2025

::: {#projects-2025}
:::

## 2024

::: {#projects-2024}
:::

## 2023

::: {#projects-2023}
:::

## 2022

::: {#projects-2022}
:::
